_meta.description: Hard memory stores exact facts that must never be altered during generation. These are domain-specific constants, confirmed term mappings, and verified values.
_meta.usage: The AI reads this file during the RECALL step. Every entry here is treated as ground truth. If a user's notes conflict with hard_memory, flag the conflict but present the hard_memory value as the established standard.
_meta.maintenance: The AI or user adds entries when a fact is confirmed. Entries are never modified without explicit user approval.

critical_terms._note: CN-EN term pairs that the user has explicitly confirmed or that appear consistently in all 3 published papers. These override any alternative translations.

standard_units._note: Standard units used in geotechnical AI papers. Always use these unless the user specifies otherwise.

notation_conventions._note: Symbol conventions the user consistently uses across papers.

evaluation_metrics._note: Standard metrics and their abbreviations as used in the user's papers.

model_names._note: User's own model names. Always capitalize and format exactly as listed.

journal_formatting._note: Journal-specific formatting rules the user has encountered. Add entries as new journals are targeted.

Computers_and_Geotechnics.figure_citation: Fig. X or Figure X (both accepted)
